title: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
friendlyTitle: WhatsApp Business is getting a global AI agent
summary: TechCrunch reports that Meta is rolling out its Meta Business Agent globally in WhatsApp Business, with capabilities for answering questions, recommending products, booking appointments, qualifying leads and escalating to humans.
friendlySummary: Meta’s business agent can answer customer questions, suggest products, book appointments and pass conversations to a person when needed.
whyItMatters: AI agents are moving into the customer-service channels small businesses already use. For customers, this may mean faster replies; for businesses, it creates a new layer of automation and a new cost model tied to messaging and tokens.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make small-business support faster and cheaper, especially for companies that already rely on WhatsApp to talk to customers.
